analyst_briefing: CRISIS regime/VERY HIGH conviction holds per 2026-04-17 history (system avg -0.68); no regime change warranted as SA indicators (USTR agenda, Mercosur pivot, Section 232 persistence) corroborate structural tariff entrenchment at T3 rung (15-22% effective). Turnberry deal (CC, non-episodic) locks competitiveness drag (EU exports -4.6%); EU Parliament vote episodic pending ratification—TS noise, not SA shift. Asset classes: 6/8 BEARISH (Metals -0.58 dev -0.27, Energy -0.87 oil shock, EM Eq -0.87), mild neg Tech/Crypto with blind spots annotated (bonds systemic crisis skew, energy divergence). Weekly summaries align except Consumer Staples/Real Estate flag_divergence (less deteriorating scores). US/non-US divergence: US policy acceleration vs EU realignment. Tail risks: EU fiscal divergence (65% lik, ESA), EM credit cascade (45% non-consensus, SCEM). Cross-flags: ESA HIGH on coercion, SCEM/ERM MEDIUM. Blind spots stable, no new activations. Three-SA corroboration blocks downgrade despite de-escalation rhetoric.
